content.text: A heading names the page or a section and its rank communicates nesting. One descriptive page heading usually anchors the outline; h2 headings name major sections; deeper ranks belong only beneath a real parent section. Rank is not a font-size choice, and a heading should not be empty or used merely as a visual label. Apply it to cooling-service directory outline review.
